basic_details.job_title: Ordnance Factory Hospital Khadki MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Ordnance Factory Hospital Khadki MBBS Doctor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: MBBS degree from MCI recognized medical college/university. He/she should be a registered medical practitioner.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the MBBS Doctor post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the MBBS Doctor post at Ordnance Factory Hospital Khadki is scheduled for 11 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the MBBS Doctor position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from an MCI recognized medical college/university and be a registered medical practitioner to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the MBBS Doctor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the MBBS Doctor position at Ordnance Factory Hospital Khadki.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the MBBS Doctor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the MBBS Doctor post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Ordnance Factory Hospital Khadki located?
faq.answer: Ordnance Factory Hospital Khadki is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411003.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the MBBS Doctor post is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is EN 27/14.
